title: Sample Open Source Ecosystem Radar — Baseline Prompt Only
executive_summary: This is realistic placeholder content for Open Source Ecosystem Radar. It demonstrates the rendering contract, evidence citations, limitations, and context x-ray fields. It is not a gold answer and should be treated as a weak baseline.

claims.claim: The sample contains enough structure to demonstrate evidence-backed rendering, but not enough to support strong real-world conclusions.
A stronger strategy should retrieve more documents and compare competing evidence before making interpretations.

evidence.title: Sample corpus artifact
evidence.excerpt: A small local sample is used to validate schema, rendering, and workflow without committing large raw data.

evidence.title: Baseline strategy note
evidence.excerpt: The weak baseline reads a small subset, writes conservative claims, and exposes what it ignored.

timeline.title: Sample corpus prepared
timeline.description: Local sample mode provides a minimal reproducible fixture.

risks.title: Overinterpretation of sample data
risks.description: Small samples are useful for testing but should not drive confident conclusions.

uncertainties.description: The placeholder submission has not processed the full corpus.
uncertainties.why_it_matters: Leaderboard users should not confuse UI fixtures with a competitive answer.
uncertainties.missing_evidence: Full data run and independent review.

recommendations.title: Use broader retrieval before making strong claims
recommendations.description: Expand coverage, deduplicate evidence, and compare conflicting records.

limitations: Does not use hidden labels or automatic judging.
